title: rubus ferox
intro: Rubus ferox, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a thorny shrub native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus ferox include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
